title: Add input validation to a divide function
prompt: The file `divide.mjs` exports `divide(a, b)`. Add input validation: if `b` is 0, throw an Error whose message contains the text 'divide by zero'. Otherwise return a / b unchanged.

grade.command: node -e "import('./divide.mjs').then(m=>{if(m.divide(10,2)!==5)throw new Error('bad quotient');let threw=false;try{m.divide(1,0)}catch(e){threw=true;if(!/divide by zero/i.test(e.message))throw new Error('wrong message: '+e.message)}if(!threw)throw new Error('did not throw on zero');console.log('ok')})"
